positive: A breathtaking celestial botanical tapestry, featuring stylized crescent moons, glowing astral flora, and intricate winding vines. The style is Neo-Art Nouveau meets deep-sea engraving, characterized by highly detailed linework and clean, bold silhouettes. The composition is radially symmetrical and centered, forming a powerful mandala-like pattern. Use a limited, elegant color palette: deep indigo and midnight blue background contrasted with metallic gold leaf accents, creamy ivory highlights, and bioluminescent teal details. The artwork must have a high-contrast, crisp vector graphic feel, suitable for printing on apparel. The aesthetic should be simultaneously ethereal, whimsical, and sophisticated. Cinematic lighting, extremely high resolution, centered focus.
